title: PLC Project Configuration
description: Configuration file for IEC 61131-3 Structured Text PLC projects (plc-project.yaml).

name.description: Project name. Used in CLI output and diagnostics.

entryPoint.description: Name of the PROGRAM to execute as the main scan cycle entry point. If omitted, the first PROGRAM found is used.

target.description: Build target platform. 'host' runs on the local machine.

sources.description: Explicit list of source file paths or glob patterns. If omitted, all .st/.scl files in the project directory are autodiscovered.

libraries.description: Additional library directories whose .st/.scl files are included in compilation.

exclude.description: File or directory patterns to exclude from autodiscovery. Supports simple globs (test_*.st) and directory names (deprecated/).

engine.description: Scan cycle engine settings — apply to both `st-cli run` and DAP debug sessions.

cycle_time.description: Target scan cycle period. If set, the engine sleeps after each cycle so the total period (execution + sleep) matches the target. If a single cycle exceeds the target, the next cycle starts immediately (no catch-up). Omit to run as fast as the CPU allows. Accepts a duration string (e.g., '10ms', '500us', '1s') or a bare number interpreted as milliseconds.

retain.description: RETAIN/PERSISTENT variable storage settings. Variables declared with RETAIN or PERSISTENT qualifiers are saved to disk and restored across restarts.

checkpoint_cycles.description: Number of scan cycles between automatic retain checkpoints. 0 disables periodic checkpoints (variables are only saved on shutdown).

links.description: Communication links — physical transport channels (TCP sockets, serial ports). Each link can serve multiple devices.

devices.description: Communication devices — addressable units on links. Each device becomes a named global struct instance in ST code.

link.description: A communication link — physical transport layer (serial port, TCP socket).

name.description: Unique link name. Referenced by devices via the 'link' field.

host.description: TCP/UDP: remote host IP address or hostname.

port.description: TCP/UDP: remote port number. Serial: device path.

device.description: A communication device — an addressable unit on a link. The 'name' becomes a global struct variable in ST code.

name.description: Global variable name in ST code. Must be a valid IEC 61131-3 identifier (e.g., 'rack_left', 'pump_vfd').

link.description: Name of the link this device communicates over. Must match a link name defined in the 'links' section.

mode.description: I/O mode. 'cyclic': read/write every scan cycle. 'acyclic': on-demand only.

cycle_time.description: Minimum interval between I/O updates for this device. Duration string (e.g., '10ms', '100ms', '1s'). Only used when mode is 'cyclic'.

device_profile.description: Name of the device profile YAML file (without .yaml extension). The profile defines the struct type and register map. Searched in: project profiles/ dir, then built-in profiles.
